environmentConstraints: Delegated Task/subagent launches failed with `Invalid model: custom:CLIProxyAPI-5.4-xhigh`; flow validation was completed directly in-session after the failed delegation attempt.

Passive runtime setup probes failed during this round: `127.0.0.1:8081` and `127.0.0.1:5433` refused TCP connections, while `http://localhost:9090/actuator/health` was unreachable with curl exit 7. The governance-review assertion set was documentation-only and remained fully testable via `docs/code-review/**`.
